body:
Update `SphereGrid` constructor to use `spacefillingcurve`

- add docs detailing various grid construction options and visualizing the spacefilling curve
- add unit tests
title: Construct `SphereGrid` with spacefillingcurve

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 

Tries to make ClimaAtmos unit tests more meaningful and comprehensive:
* Removes tests of ClimaCore (they should live in ClimaCore)
* Adds test of key computations, e.g., kinetic energy and strain rate in the presence of spherical geometry and topography, to provide more comprehensive coverage
* Replaces `@assert's` by `@test`
* Removes redundant tests
* Parallelizes unit tests into test groups executed simultaneously in CI

Also fixes two unrelated issues that caused errors/problems:
* Fixed `vertical_transport` → `vertical_advection` bug in advection.jl
* Made `thermo_vars` GPU-compatible via multiple dispatch in precomputed_quantities.jl
* Downgraded Thermodynamics compat entry

## To-do

Several other tests still need to be refactored/added. For example, we need conservation unit tests.

## Content
<!---  specific tasks that are currently complete 
- Solution implemented
-->

- followed the documentation policy: https://github.com/CliMA/policies/wiki/Documentation-Policy
- checked that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.

In the Content, I have included 
- relevant unit tests, and integration tests, 
- appropriate docstrings on all functions, structs, and modules, and included relevant documentation.

-->

----
- [ ] I have read and checked the items on the review checklist.
title: Refactor of Atmos unit tests, Part I
